commands.review_summary:
The PR expands dedicated-account live testing and cleanup/retry handling, fixes Markdown table parsing and multi-tab Docs named-range mutations, and updates related documentation.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main rejects valid one-column delimiters, drops later separator-shaped table rows, and lacks owning-tab criteria for default-tab named-range mutations. The PR also reports exact-head live verification.
